name: pair-paced-amrap
rawText:
GORILLOT - FIT FOR LIFE
WOD
Metcon
A. STRENGTH (squat)
Front Squat
4 sets x 3 reps @70➔85+% (Climbing)
B. METCON (Medium)
In pairs, 12 minutes AMRAP:
P1 - 200m run
P2 - AMRAP:
6 thrusters @35/50kg
6 Burpees
* Continue from where you stopped
** Score is the total rounds completed
C. Cash out
2 sets:
15-20 Tibialis raises
25-30 sec/side single arm plank hold
